reason: Circuit is F = (X+Y) XOR ((Y XOR Z) + X'); truth table gives minterms 0,1,4,7 = X'Y'Z'+X'Y'Z+XY'Z'+XYZ = X'Y' + Y'Z' + XYZ.
K-map ones at minterms 0,2,8,10 (X=0,Z=0 -> X'Z') and 5,7,13,15 (X=1,Z=1 -> XZ); W and Y are don't-cares.

blindAnswer: A: MOVE R1,R2 | B: MOVE #X,R1 | C: MOVE (A0),R1 | D: MOVE X(A0),R1
reason: Register direct uses the register's contents; immediate uses a literal (#); register indirect dereferences the register; indexed-basic adds a displacement to the base register before dereferencing.
sourceAnswer: A. Move R1,R2  B. Move #X,R1  C. Move (A0),R1  D. Move X(A0),R1

blindAnswer: Q starts 0; toggles to 1 at clock edge 1 (T=1), holds 1 at edge 2 (T=0), toggles to 0 at edge 3 (T=1), toggles to 1 at edge 4 (T=1).
reason: T-FF toggles on a rising clock edge only when T=1; sampling T at the four rising edges gives 1,0,1,1 -> Q = 1,1,0,1.
sourceAnswer: Model-answer figure: Q rises at edge 1, stays high through edge 2, falls at edge 3, rises at edge 4.

reason: NIST essential characteristics include on-demand self-service, broad network access, resource pooling, rapid elasticity; fixed capacity is the opposite of elasticity.
Fetch-decode-execute is by definition the instruction cycle.
A hypervisor/virtualization layer multiplexes one physical server into many VMs.
Automatic updates is the only listed item that is an advantage; the other three are drawbacks.
Control decreases IaaS > PaaS > SaaS; SaaS users only consume the application.
A bus is the shared set of lines carrying address/data/control between CPU, memory, and I/O.
NIST community cloud = infrastructure shared by several organizations with common concerns; public cloud is open to the general public rather than 'multiple organizations' specifically.
Azure is Microsoft's cloud platform.
IAM = Identity and Access Management.
Encryption transforms plaintext into ciphertext (unreadable without the key).
A Service Level Agreement binds the cloud service provider and its customer to agreed service levels.
Serverless (FaaS) lets users run code while the provider handles provisioning and scaling of servers.
AWS Lambda is the canonical serverless/FaaS offering; 'Serverless computing' is the most specific listed option.
Processing near the data source cuts round-trip time to the cloud, so the headline benefit is reduced latency (bandwidth use also drops, but latency is the standard answer).
